message:
feat(fwc): operation-aware intent compilation and generator scaffold regression fixtures

Wire the discovery catalog's operation manifests into the intent compiler
so that plan compilation can validate operation selectors against real
connector capabilities rather than relying on string-matching heuristics.

Key additions:
- ManifestOperationProfile: normalized view of a discovered operation
  with all selector aliases, risk/safety metadata, and usage guidance
- OperationIndex: lazy-loaded BTreeMap index keyed by connector slug,
  enabling O(1) lookup of operation profiles during plan compilation
- selector_keys() / matches_selector(): normalize and match operation
  selectors using the same canonicalization as the readiness module
- Generator test fixture infrastructure in new_cmd.rs tests: helpers to
  load/write golden JSON bundles and a canonical_truthful_request_response_bundle
  factory that exercises all 10 connector archetypes
- testdata/catalog.json + README.md: document and register the new
  generator/ golden fixture directory convention

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,3 +5,4 @@ Conventions:
 - JSON files stay strict JSON so they can be deserialized directly in tests.
 - TOML and JSONL files are also kept parseable by the real `fwc` parsers.
 - `golden/` contains future-facing render snapshots for `fwc access`, `fwc setup`, and `fwc mesh`; those files are syntax-checked and cataloged without claiming the command family is fully implemented yet.
+- `generator/` stores canonical `fwc new` scaffold bundles so exact emitted manifest/runtime/test surfaces can be frozen and diffed in regression tests.

@@ -15,6 +15,7 @@
     { "path": "batch/invalid_batch.jsonl", "kind": "batch_jsonl", "purpose": "Semantically invalid batch fixture for error handling.", "validation": "semantic" },
     { "path": "batch/mixed_batch.jsonl", "kind": "batch_jsonl", "purpose": "Mixed-connector batch fixture for heterogeneous dispatch.", "validation": "semantic" },
     { "path": "batch/simple_batch.jsonl", "kind": "batch_jsonl", "purpose": "Homogeneous batch fixture for map-style execution.", "validation": "semantic" },
+    { "path": "generator/truthful_request_response_bundle.json", "kind": "golden_json", "purpose": "Canonical truthful request-response scaffold bundle emitted by fwc new for exact regression coverage.", "validation": "json" },
     { "path": "golden/access_plan.json", "kind": "golden_json", "purpose": "Future access command JSON render snapshot.", "validation": "json" },
     { "path": "golden/access_plan.toon", "kind": "golden_toon", "purpose": "Future access command TOON render snapshot.", "validation": "text" },
     { "path": "golden/dispatch_invocations.json", "kind": "golden_json", "purpose": "Representative future dispatch invocation argv vectors.", "validation": "json" },
